demographics.living_situation: lives independently in a private residence; alone at the time of contact

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I read my test results and it says my thyroid is failing. I feel incredibly weak, I can't catch my breath, and my heart is skipping beats. I'm terrified my body is shutting down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I saw abnormal blood results about an hour ago, looked it up online, and now my heart is racing and I can't breathe properly — I need to know if something serious is happening right now.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, right after I read my thyroid blood results online
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly an hour and it hasn't fully settled
symptom_narrative.character: my heart is pounding and feels like it's skipping or adding extra beats, I feel short of breath and can't seem to catch a full breath, and I feel weak all over
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it feels really intense and frightening — like something terrible is about to happen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest and my whole body — heart, breathing, and a general shaky weakness
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on suddenly after reading the results and has been coming in waves since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has really helped yet, though it eases a little if I try to sit still
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: reading more about it online and thinking about the results makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: fast breathing, shakiness, and a strong sense of dread
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've felt anxious before but never physical symptoms this strong
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't concentrate on anything except my symptoms right now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently told my thyroid blood tests were abnormal
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: found on a recent screening blood test
past_medical_history.how_managed: no treatment started; told it would be monitored

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had trouble with sleep that doesn't feel refreshing and some small changes in my weight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was at home alone and became very distressed after reading the results on the computer; has been searching medical websites about the thyroid result

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, fearful messages focused on the worst-case interpretation of the lab result

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-recalled weight, not measured this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing really fast and can't slow it down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation of rapid breathing, not a counted rate
